news.headline: Brazil’s Lula launches anti-organised crime plan amid rising security pressure before elections
news.summary: Brazilian President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva on Tuesday launched a new anti-organized crime plan, seeking to counter mounting security concerns five months before elections.
